description: Composition Sage grey top made of polyviscose jersey fabric, has short sleeves, round neck with a small buttoned chest placket, grey tape along the neckline and placket, pleats at the neckline, ruched on the waist hems, has a belt at the back, curved hem and branding in glitter on the left chest Fitting Regular Wash care only hand wash cold using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Turn inside out before washing and drying Do not bleach, wring or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Mild iron/do not iron on print or embroidery Slip into comfort with ease in this sage grey top from lee. The polyviscose jersey fabric flows well over your body, keeping sweat at bay and offering fresh comfort, while the ruching at the side waists coupled with the belt at the back allow you to flaunt your curvaceous waist with much elan. Team this with a knee-length pencil skirt and a short denim jacket or hakoba jacket or slim-Fit jeans and ballerina flats for a chic, laidback look. Model statistics The model wears size M in tops Height: 5'7"; Chest: 33"; Waist: 25"
